title: GSK Terminates Camlipixant After Phase 3 Failure
headline: GSK ceased development of cough drug camlipixant after mixed Phase 3 data, abandoning a drug from a $2 billion deal.
key_facts: $2 billion deal; third P2X3 antagonist to fail

prior_coverage.headline: GSK discontinued Phase 3 chronic cough drug camlipixant after mixed data, marking the third failure in the P2X3 antagonist class and raising write-down risk on its ~$2B Bellus Health acquisition.

title: Novartis Fabhalta Gains Full FDA Approval in IgAN
headline: FDA granted traditional approval to Novartis' Fabhalta (iptacopan) on July 17, 2026, as first complement inhibitor to slow kidney function decline in primary IgAN.
key_facts: Iptacopan; complement pathway inhibitor; oral; converts from accelerated approval

prior_coverage.headline: FDA converted Fabhalta's accelerated approval to full traditional approval for immunoglobulin A nephropathy (IgAN), solidifying its commercial position in kidney disease treatment.

title: Merck Wins First PCSK9 Oral Cholesterol Pill Approval
headline: Merck achieved first FDA approval of an oral PCSK9 cholesterol-lowering pill, advancing beyond injectables.
key_facts: PCSK9 inhibitor; oral formulation; first approval in class

title: Merck ADC Shows Potential in Lung Cancer Study
headline: Merck's sac-TMT (sacituzumab tirumotecan) showed potential to replace chemotherapy in front-line lung cancer; OptiTROP-Lung06 Phase 3 met primary PFS endpoint with Keytruda, reported July 17, 2026.
key_facts: sac-TMT; TROP2-directed ADC; OptiTROP-Lung06 Phase 3; met primary PFS endpoint; combined with pembrolizumab

prior_coverage.headline: Merck's ADC sac-TMT shows potential to replace chemotherapy in front-line PD-L1-negative NSCLC, per China Phase 3 trial OptiTROP-Lung06.

title: Lilly Acquires AtaiBeckley for $2.8 Billion
headline: Eli Lilly to acquire AtaiBeckley for $2.8 billion, validating psychedelics; Lilly's 11th drugmaker acquisition this year.
key_facts: $2.8 billion acquisition; 11th acquisition by Lilly this year

prior_coverage.headline: Eli Lilly agrees to acquire psychedelic-focused AtaiBeckley for $2.8 billion upfront, marking Big Pharma's strongest embrace of psychedelic medicine for treatment-resistant depression.

title: Celcuity Gains FDA Approval for Revtorpyk
headline: Celcuity (CELC) gained FDA approval for breast cancer drug Revtorpyk (gedatolisib) for HR+/HER2- breast cancer around July 15, 2026; shares fell nearly 20% on launch-delay disclosure.
key_facts: Gedatolisib (Revtorpyk); HR+/HER2- breast cancer; share decline ~20%; launch delay

prior_coverage.headline: Celcuity won FDA approval for breast cancer drug Revtorpyk but shares fell nearly 20% following a launch delay and prescribing information surprises.

title: Sanofi Sarclisa SC Faces July 23 FDA Decision
headline: Sanofi's subcutaneous Sarclisa (isatuximab-irfc) faces July 23, 2026 FDA decision after three-month PDUFA extension; uses on-body injector.
key_facts: Isatuximab-irfc; subcutaneous; on-body injector (OBI); three-month PDUFA extension; multiple myeloma indications

prior_coverage.headline: Sanofi secured FDA approval for a subcutaneous on-body injector version of Sarclisa following an earlier regulatory delay.

title: Biotech IPO Wave Gains Momentum in July
headline: Latigo Biotherapeutics, BlossomHill Therapeutics, and Vogenx joined IPO queue in July; Attovia, Braveheart Bio, and Apnimed also filed, marking surge in 2026 biotech offerings.
key_facts: Multiple IPO filings in July 2026; 5th-7th startups in July queue; Attovia focuses on I&I; biotech raised IPO offering

prior_coverage.headline: Braveheart, Attovia, and Vogenx join the biotech initial public offering queue for 2026.

title: Jasper Merges with Immune Drugmaker Kira
headline: Jasper merges with immune drugmaker Kira plus concurrent licensing deal with startup Mirador, after setbacks wiped out most of Jasper's market value.
key_facts: Merger with Kira; concurrent licensing deal with Mirador; prior market value loss

prior_coverage.headline: Jasper Therapeutics completed all-stock acquisition of Kira Pharmaceuticals with concurrent $132M private placement, securing runway into H2 2028 and out-licensing complement assets to Mirador Therapeutics.

title: Corcept Relacorilant Approved; Insider Activity Noted
headline: FDA approved Corcept's relacorilant (Lifyorli) on March 25, 2026, in combination with nab-paclitaxel for platinum-resistant ovarian cancer; CDO sold 20,000 shares July 7.
key_facts: Lifyorli (relacorilant); glucocorticoid receptor antagonist; combined with nab-paclitaxel; platinum-resistant ovarian/fallopian/peritoneal cancer; 1-3 prior therapies; CDO sold 20,000 shares July 7, 2026; $1.05 billion outlook

prior_coverage.headline: Corcept CDO William Guyer sold 20,000 shares ($1.9M) post-relacorilant approval, with $1.05B 2026 revenue outlook and late-2026 Cushing's PDUFA pending.

title: Eli Lilly Orforglipron Approved; Launched with $50/Month Option
headline: FDA approved Lilly's orforglipron (Foundayo) around April 1, 2026, as first oral GLP-1 pill with no food/water restrictions; Medicare enrollees pay as little as $50/month starting July 1.
key_facts: Foundayo (orforglipron); oral GLP-1; no food/water restrictions; National Priority Voucher Program; Medicare Part D copay $50/month; available via LillyDirect from April 6

prior_coverage.headline: Eli Lilly's oral GLP-1 agonist Foundayo (orforglipron) shows increasing prescription uptake according to FiercePharma tracking.

title: Scribe Therapeutics IPO Still Lacks Pricing Details
headline: Scribe Therapeutics (SCTX, S-1 filed July 2, 2026) remains unpruced despite SEC filing; lead candidate STX-1150 CRISPR epigenetic therapy in Australian trial for cardiovascular disease.
key_facts: S-1 filed July 2, 2026; no price range announced; Nasdaq Global Market; co-founded by Jennifer Doudna (Nobel laureate); STX-1150 epigenetic-silencing CRISPR for cardiovascular/cholesterol; $150M raised since 2017; $49.7M cash; $175.1M accumulated deficit; would be 14th venture-backed biotech IPO in 2026

prior_coverage.headline: Biogen releases data on tau-targeting Alzheimer's disease therapeutic candidate.

title: Novartis Pelacarsen Phase 3 Data Delayed; H1 2026 Window Closing
headline: Ionis (Novartis partner) expects pelacarsen Phase 3 topline data in H1 2026 and regulatory submissions H2 2026, but no readout announced as of July 19, 2026.
key_facts: Pelacarsen (TQJ230); antisense Lp(a)-lowering; Phase 3 Lp(a)HORIZON; expected H1 2026 topline (Jan 31, 2025 guidance); regulatory submissions H2 2026; NCT06813911 (pelacarsen + inclisiran in ASCVD) last updated July 14, 2026

prior_coverage.headline: Biotech selloff hits Moderna, ImmunityBio, Sarepta, and Ionis; Ionis Phase 3 trial failure erases a year of gains.
